videos.headline: Georgia bounces back with home win over Kentucky
videos.description: Georgia gets a solid bounce-back game as they defeat Kentucky at home.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Georgia bounces back with home win over Kentucky) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Georgia's successful challenge results in Dillon Bell's 2nd TD
videos.description: Georgia wins the challenge of a fumble and it pays off with Dillon Bell's second touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_Highlight (Georgia's successful challenge results in Dillon Bell's 2nd TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Bell's spectacular one-handed catch sets up a Bulldogs TD
videos.description: Dillon Bell makes an awesome one-handed catch which results in a Cash Jones touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Dillon Bell's spectacular one-handed catch sets up a Bulldogs TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Highlight: Stockton, Bell power No. 12 Georgia past Kentucky
videos.description: Gunner Stockton throws one touchdown and rushes for two as Dillon Bell shines with two TDs of his own to give the Bulldogs a 35-14 win over the Wildcats.

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton dives across the goal line for a Georgia TD
videos.description: Gunner Stockton keeps it himself and dives across the goal line to put the Bulldogs on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton dives across the goal line for a Georgia TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton trots in for his 2nd rushing TD
videos.description: Gunner Stockton puts a nice move on Kentucky's linebacker and trots into the end zone for his second rushing touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton trots in for his 2nd rushing TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Cutter Boley finds Josh Kattus for a Kentucky TD
videos.description: Josh Kattus hauls in the dime from Cutter Boley and finds the end zone to put the Wildcats on the board.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Cutter Boley finds Josh Kattus for a Kentucky TD) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Jordan Lovett rises for an impressive INT for Kentucky
videos.description: Jordan Lovett climbs the ladder for a much-needed interception for the Wildcats.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Jordan Lovett rises for an impressive INT for Kentucky ) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Bell takes the jet sweep to the house for Georgia
videos.description: Dillon Bell finds pay dirt to pad the Bulldogs' lead late in the second quarter.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Bell takes the jet sweep to the house for Georgia) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Dillon Bell crosses goal line for 3-yard rushing touchdown
videos.description: Dillon Bell crosses goal line for 3-yard rushing touchdown

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Dillon Bell crosses goal line for 3-yard rushing touchdown) 2025/10/04 ESHEET

videos.headline: Gunner Stockton throws 16-yard touchdown pass vs. Kentucky
videos.description: Gunner Stockton throws 16-yard touchdown pass vs. Kentucky

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Gunner Stockton throws 16-yard touchdown pass vs. Kentucky) 2025/10/04 ESHEET
